entities.name: hardcoded regex/keyword patterns
entities.context: Patterns used in a system that are characterized by specific limitations.

entities.name: Brittle
entities.context: Describes a limitation of the patterns that miss variations.

entities.name: Maintenance-heavy
entities.context: Describes a limitation where new patterns must be manually added.

entities.name: Context-blind
entities.context: Describes a limitation where the system can't understand intent.
